ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gardens" (
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the garden */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the garden */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the garden */,
  "garden_type" TEXT /* Type of garden (e.g., Vegetables, Flowers) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the garden in square meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the garden */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water for irrigation */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Current funding status (e.g., funded, under review) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance activities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garden was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garden was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garden_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the garden (e.g., coordinator, volunteer) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the member was active in the garden */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member joined the garden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garden_members_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crop */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden where the crop is planted */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the crop is expected to be harvested */,
  "quantity_planted" INTEGER /* Number of plants or seeds planted */,
  "yield" INTEGER /* Expected or actual yield of the crop */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the crop (e.g., specific care instructions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., workshop, festival) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of expected or actual attendees */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for event registration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pests" (
  "pest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pest report */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden affected by the pest */,
  "pest_name" TEXT /* Name of the pest */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the pest was reported */,
  "control_measures" TEXT /* Control measures taken to manage the pest */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up inspection or treatment */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the member who reported the pest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pest damage or issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pests_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden where the resource is available */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., tool, seed, fertilizer) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last date the resource was inspected */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the resource (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workshops" (
  "workshop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the workshop */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden where the workshop is held */,
  "workshop_name" TEXT /* Name of the workshop */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor leading the workshop */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workshop */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workshop in hours */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the workshop registration (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workshop content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workshop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workshops_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the donation */,
  "garden_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garden receiving the donation */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., monetary, in-kind) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount donated */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the donation was made */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., received, pending) */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_garden_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_id") REFERENCES gardens ("garden_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member, volunteer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, member, volunteer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
